data.summary: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the requirement for multi-channel communication.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the multi-channel communication capability (email, SMS, push notification). However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines the need for multi-channel communication, but without specific evidence confirming its implementation, the requirement cannot be deemed satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of multi-channel communication (email, SMS, push notification).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-channel communication requirement.
